name: Comstock Holding Companies, Inc.
summary: Comstock Holding Companies, Inc. (CHCI) is a leading asset manager, developer, and operator of mixed-use and transit-oriented properties in the Washington, D.C. region. Founded in 1985, the company provides asset management, property management, development and construction management, leasing, and other real estate services. Its managed portfolio includes 92 assets totaling commercial, residential, hospitality, and parking properties, anchored by Reston Station and Loudoun Station developments along Metro's Silver Line in Northern Virginia.

products.name: Asset Management Services
products.description: Long-term asset management agreements providing fee-based revenue, anchored by the 2022 AMA with Comstock Partners, LC.

products.name: Property/Facility Management
products.description: Property management through CHCI Commercial, CHCI Residential, and ParkX subsidiaries covering security, janitorial, concierge, and more.

products.name: Development and Construction Management
products.description: Management of real estate development and construction for mixed-use and transit-oriented properties.

products.name: ParkX Management
products.description: Parking management services operating approximately 26,000 spaces across 34 garages, including third-party owned garages.

products.name: Leasing and Marketing
products.description: Leasing and marketing services for commercial and residential assets in the managed portfolio.

products.name: Acquisition and Disposition Services
products.description: Advisory services for real estate asset acquisitions and dispositions for institutional and private clients.

partnerships.description: Long-term full-service asset management agreement (2022 AMA) covering all Anchor Portfolio properties; affiliate controlled by CEO Christopher Clemente.
Public-private partnership for the 1.7 million sq ft subterranean garage and transit facility at Reston Station.
Virginia's first JW Marriott branded property at Reston Station, including a 248-key hotel and 94 luxury condominiums.
Future headquarters tenant in Trophy-class office towers at The Row at Reston Station.
Corporate or regional headquarters tenant in Trophy-class office towers at Metro Plaza District, Reston Station.
